items.name: Adaptation
items.description: Incoming damage temporarily reduces damage of that type by up to 90%.

items.name: Adrenaline
items.description: Converts 40% of damage received on shields to Energy.

items.name: Arcane Energize
items.description: On Energy Pickup: 60% chance to replenish 150 energy to nearby allies.

items.name: Bane of Corpus
items.description: Increases damage against Corpus by up to 30%.

items.name: Blood Rush
items.description: Critical chance increases with each increase of the Melee Combo Counter.

items.name: Brief Respite
items.description: Casting an ability generates 50 shields.

items.name: Carnis Set
items.description: Part of the Carnis set. Provides bonus set effects when all parts are equipped.

items.name: Comet Blast
items.description: Increases Blast Damage by 15%.

items.name: Condition Overload
items.description: Melee damage increases by 120% for each unique Status Effect on the target.

items.name: Corrosive Projection
items.description: Reduces enemy armor by 30%.

items.name: Critical Delay
items.description: Increases critical chance but decreases fire rate for rifles.

items.name: Cunning Drift
items.description: Increases ability range by 15% and adds 15% parkour velocity.

items.name: Drifting Contact
items.description: Increases combo duration by 5 seconds and adds 15% status chance.

items.name: Enemy Sense
items.description: Increases the range of enemy detection on the minimap.

items.name: Fireball Frenzy
items.description: Grants allies 50% fire damage with Ember's Fire Blast.

items.name: Flow
items.description: Increases maximum Energy by 150%.

items.name: Fusilai
items.description: On Nikana Stances, enables thrown blades with unique stats.

items.name: Gladiator Might
items.description: Increases critical damage by up to 60%.

items.name: Handspring
items.description: Reduces knockdown recovery time by 60%.

items.name: Heavy Caliber
items.description: Increases damage but reduces accuracy.

items.name: Hunter Munitions
items.description: On critical hit, applies 30% slash status.

items.name: Intensify
items.description: Increases Ability Strength by 30%.

items.name: Mod Link
items.description: Shares your equipped Warframe aura with nearby allies.

items.name: Narrow Minded
items.description: Increases Ability Duration but reduces Ability Range.

items.name: Overextended
items.description: Increases Ability Range but reduces Ability Strength.

items.name: Primed Continuity
items.description: Increases Ability Duration by up to 55%.

items.name: Primed Cryo Rounds
items.description: Adds Cold damage to rifles by up to 165%.

items.name: Primed Flow
items.description: Increases maximum Energy by 275%.

items.name: Primed Point Blank
items.description: Increases Shotgun damage by up to 165%.

items.name: Riven Mod
items.description: A unique mod with random attributes. Requires Kuva to cycle stats.

items.name: Serration
items.description: Increases Rifle damage by up to 165%.

items.name: Slash Dash
items.description: Melee stance that enables fast sliding attacks.

items.name: Speed Drift
items.description: Increases sprint speed by 15% and gives 15% casting speed.

items.name: Streamline
items.description: Increases Ability Efficiency by 30%.

items.name: Stretch
items.description: Increases Ability Range by 45%.

items.name: Transient Fortitude
items.description: Increases Ability Strength but reduces Ability Duration.

items.name: Umbral Intensify
items.description: Increases Ability Strength by 44% and enhances Umbral set bonus.

items.name: Vigilante Pursuit
items.description: Increases enemy radar range by 30m.

items.name: Viral Strike
items.description: Adds Viral damage to melee attacks.

items.name: Vitality
items.description: Increases maximum Health by 440%.
